label: Salesloft
description: Connect to Salesloft to automate cadences, sync prospect activity, and pull engagement data into Anton.

form.title: Connect Salesloft
form.subtitle: Authorize Anton to access your Salesloft account via OAuth 2.0.

methods.label: Sign in with Salesloft (OAuth 2.0)
methods.description: Connect via Salesloft's OAuth 2.0 flow. Requires you to register a Salesloft OAuth app and supply your own Client ID and Client Secret — no API key path exists.
methods.how_to:
## Connect Salesloft via OAuth 2.0 (Bring Your Own App)

Salesloft only supports OAuth 2.0 for API access — there is no API key or personal access token. You must register an OAuth application in Salesloft to get credentials.

## 1. Register a Salesloft OAuth App

1. Log in to [Salesloft](https://app.salesloft.com) as an admin.
2. Navigate to **Settings → Integrations → API** (or go to [https://app.salesloft.com/settings/integrations/api](https://app.salesloft.com/settings/integrations/api)).
3. Click **Create New App**.
4. Give the app a name like `Anton`.
5. Under **Redirect URIs**, add `http://localhost` (Anton uses a local redirect to capture the authorization code).
6. Save the app — Salesloft will display your **Application ID (Client ID)** and **Secret (Client Secret)**.

## 2. Note Required Scopes

Salesloft does not use granular scope strings in the OAuth URL — all authorized scopes are controlled by what your app is granted in the app settings. No scope query parameters are needed.

## 3. Enter Credentials in Anton

1. Copy your **Client ID** and **Client Secret** from the Salesloft app page.
2. Paste them into the fields below.
3. Click **Submit** — Anton will open your browser to Salesloft's consent screen.
4. Log in and click **Authorize** to complete the connection.

## Notes

- Tokens are stored locally and refreshed automatically using the refresh token.
- If you revoke access, go to **Salesloft Settings → Integrations → API**, find your app, and remove it. Re-authorize in Anton to reconnect.
- Only Salesloft admins can register OAuth apps.

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: Client ID
fields.description: Found on your registered Salesloft OAuth app page under Settings → Integrations → API.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.label: Client Secret
fields.description: The secret paired with your Client ID from the same Salesloft app page. Shown once — store it safely.
